feedback: App crashes every time I try to upload a photo. Completely unusable.
Billing charged me twice this month. Still waiting for a refund after 2 weeks.
Search results are completely irrelevant. Searching 'blue shoes' shows red bags.
Love the new dark mode! Much easier on the eyes during night sessions.
The app froze and I lost 30 minutes of work. This is unacceptable.
Cancellation process is confusing. Took me 20 minutes to find the option.
Filters on the search page don't stick after refresh. Very frustrating.
Your customer support team was incredibly helpful resolving my issue!
Why is my invoice showing a charge for a plan I downgraded from last month?
The new onboarding flow is much cleaner. Got set up in under 5 minutes.
Push notifications stopped working after the latest update.
Can you add CSV export for the reports? Really need this for my workflow.
Logged in and all my saved data was gone. Absolutely terrified. Please help.
Great product overall. Minor UI quirk: the back button sometimes skips a screen.
Payment failed three times. Card is definitely valid — works everywhere else.
Dashboard loads so slowly on mobile. Took 12 seconds on WiFi.
Feature request: allow bulk editing of multiple items at once.
App keeps asking me to re-login even though I selected 'remember me'.
Refund was processed quickly. Appreciate the fast turnaround!
The tutorial videos are helpful but some are outdated for the new UI.
Crash on startup after iOS 18 update. Tried reinstalling, same issue.
Price increased without any notice. Found out when my card was charged.
Search autocomplete is amazing now. Saves so much time finding things.
Two-factor authentication is broken. Never receive the SMS code.
Would love a calendar view for scheduling. The list view gets overwhelming.
App is draining battery significantly faster since the v3.2 update.
Signed up for annual plan but was charged monthly rate. Please fix.
The collaboration features work seamlessly. My whole team is now onboard.
Random 500 errors when saving. Happens about 1 in 5 times.
Dark mode colors look washed out on OLED screens. Needs adjustment.
Cannot delete my account. The delete button does nothing.
Onboarding checklist was a great idea — helped me discover features I'd missed.
App crashes when I try to share a file larger than 10MB.
Invoice PDF is completely blank when downloaded on Windows.
Search now supports boolean operators? That's a game-changer for power users.
Stuck in an infinite loading loop on the checkout page. Can't complete purchase.
Subscription renewed even though I cancelled 2 weeks ago. Need a refund.
The offline mode is a lifesaver for commuters. Works perfectly.
Keyboard shortcuts would make this so much faster to use on desktop.
App shows wrong currency for my region. Displays USD but should be EUR.
Completely lost my streak because the app didn't sync properly.
Integration with Slack works great. Notifications are timely and useful.
Cannot attach files in the in-app chat. The button does nothing.
Very disappointed with the response time from support — 5 days and counting.
New widget on the home screen is beautiful. Really polished feel.
App crashes specifically when switching between portrait and landscape mode.
I was double charged for two consecutive months. This needs urgent attention.
The data export is missing half the fields we actually need.
Performance on older Android devices is terrible. My phone becomes unusable.
Filtering by date range works perfectly now. Whatever you fixed, thank you!
